entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop being developed for high yield and resistance.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics.

entities.name: ICARDA
entities.description: International Center for Agricultural Research in Dry Areas.

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability of a crop to produce a large amount of agricultural produce per unit area.

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist the effects of a pathogen.

entities.name: PEST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by pests.

entities.name: PEDIGREE METHOD
entities.description: A plant breeding method where records of ancestry are kept for each line.

entities.name: BULK ADVANCE
entities.description: A breeding method where populations are advanced in bulk without individual selection in early generations.

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION TURNOVER
entities.description: A technique to accelerate the breeding cycle by increasing the number of generations per year.

entities.name: CHICKPEA BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A collaborative effort between ICRISAT and ICARDA to improve chickpea cultivars.
